stimulus: Following her breakout role in 1995, Brazilian actress Fernanda Montenegro quickly became internationally known. By 2010, she ______blank one of the most decorated performers in Latin American cinema, having starred in twenty-five films and won multiple international awards—more than any other Brazilian actress at the time.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The past perfect verb “had become” correctly indicates that her becoming widely decorated was completed by a specified past point (2010), before the present moment of writing.

Choice A (future) and Choice C (future perfect) don’t fit a past time frame. Choice B (present) doesn’t capture the completed-by-2010 sense.
